# Work Card

Status: Manual Day-0

Use this as a file-based Work Card copy for manual dry runs. If GitHub Issues
are available, the GitHub Work Card remains the shared task card and should
link back to this artifact when used.

Unit blocked instead of treating this card as a substitute.
